creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
> This is from the official RELEASE NOTES:
Yes, I've read it after your answer. I'm posting a report to dunst's
homepage about dunstify's status. I hope will be an answer in some
days.

I'm using dunstify too (copied into my ~/bin) and I didn't mark breaks
- so it works for me. I think shouldn't include dunstify into port
until author's answer.
